items.html:
环境条件温度-20℃~40℃
环境条件湿度低于90%RH（无结露）
环境条件环境远离活性气体、可燃气体、油滴、灰尘
环境条件安装海拔1000m以下：额定功率，1000m以上：每100m降额1.5%，最大4000m
items.translation:
Environmental ConditionsTemperature-20℃~40℃
Environmental ConditionsHumidityBelow 90%RH(non-condensing)
Environmental ConditionsEnvironmentKeep away from reactive gases, combustible gases, oil droplets, and dust
Environmental ConditionsInstallation AltitudeBelow 1000m: rated power; above 1000m: derate 1.5% per 100m, max 4000m
